mapper.select: SELECT id, taken_on, source, score_total, memo, created_at FROM exam_results ORDER BY taken_on DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam_results (taken_on, source, score_total, memo) VALUES (#{takenOn}, #{source}, #{scoreTotal}, #{memo})
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(score_total), 0) AS avgScore, COALESCE(MAX(score_total), 0) AS maxScore, COALESCE(MIN(score_total), 0) AS minScore FROM exam_results
